src/main/java/com/test/notifications/inf._comment: GAP-3 fix: RabbitListener must import java.util.UUID and java.time.Instant for List<UUID> and List<Instant> inner types. Without the fix the inner standard types are never imported → compile error.

src/main/java/com/test/warehouse/domain/._comment: Publisher domain event must have List<UUID> and List<Instant> fields with correct imports.

src/main/java/com/test/warehouse/applica._comment: Integration event must carry List<UUID> and List<Instant> with correct imports.
